author: Tiffany Cheung
text: We had an absolutely fantastic boat tour to the Benagil Cave! From start to finish, the experience was unforgettable. Mick, our guide, was incredibly thorough, friendly, and genuinely kind.

author: Maria Rodriguez
text: We booked this tour through Get Your Guide and we had so much fun! It was the highlight of our trip and we would really recommend it! Although it was very windy and a bit chilly, the tour was fun and the guides were funny and welcoming.

author: Nandy N
text: We did the 1:30 tour with Tim and Carlos. We had a little unexpected and had a little delay. They called us, waited and were understanding and very kind. The boat is small, which allows you to enjoy the experience without being on top of each other. Tim (the Guide) and Carlos (the Captain) made our excursion interesting with little anecdotes and jokes slipped here and there. Moreover they speak impeccable French. And the icing on the cake, dolphins accompanied us on the return. A thousand thanks Tim and Carlos. We highly recommend.

author: PeterR0we
text: Great trip out to the caves. Picking up all of the local sites on the way out. The guide Roger was highly knowledgeable and interjected a high sense of humour. The skipper was skilled at holding the boat in position in the caves for some fantastic camera shots. You can take a short swim at the end if desired but being November it's not for the faint hearted. I would thoroughly recommend.

author: Robin Passes
text: We had an incredible time on the Benagil boat tour. The guide was very entertaining and the pilot was amazing. They took us up close and personal into caves and even steered the boat 360 degrees. Stunning sights and an unforgettable experience!

author: Lisa O'Neill
text: We took a private boat tour of the caves along the Algarve. It was more than worth it. In addition to the magnificent scenery our guide Rui, Captain Alex and driver Miguel cannot be matched. Top notch all the way.

author: Isabelle Bigles
text: I loved our tour! We were there during December which is known for being more rainy, but Atlantis Tours did amazing with accommodating this. Funny enough, it was just me and my boyfriend, so it ended up being a private tour!

author: Natalie Graham
text: The boat trip was amazing from start to finish. All of the staff were very professional and Bernardo's knowledge and sense of humour made the trip very enjoyable. The scenery was amazing with a perfectly timed sunset. Thank you xx

author: Kelly Williams
text: Fabulous tour. Great commentary with Captain Jorge and his team. It was fantastic. Do not miss this when in Portimao. We loved every second of it. And the guest dolphins? Incredible!

author: Vanessa Hall
text: Excellent boat tour, I would recommend anyone to experience this in their lives. The tour guide was very funny it made the whole tour an enjoyable one. The caves and history of the Algarve was amazing. The most beautiful part Benagil cave and the sunset. It is a memory I will always cherish. Thank you Atlantis Tours.

author: 80Valeria
text: Great experience! I purchased a tour of the caves near Portimao. They put us on a large dinghy. The captain, the English speaking guide but who knew many words even in Italian, and all the rest of the staff entertained us a lot and thoroughly explained the history and legends of the caves and the area. They gave us important and useful advice on what to do in the Algarve. It was just under 2 very pleasant hours. Thank you guys!

author: Stephanie Huang
text: Spring Break 2026 with the family and wanted adventure! Kids off from college. Atlantis Tours Speedboat was fun with Miguel giving us historic tour with hilarious commentary! Even though it was overcast with rough waters and not safe to go into the caves, we still had a blast!
